## Summary

- Describe the change and the outcome it creates.

## Risk

- Data model change: yes/no
- Security-sensitive change: yes/no
- User-facing behavior change: yes/no
- Migration required before deploy: yes/no

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run db:validate`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`

## Review Notes

- Mention migrations, security decisions, deployment order, or follow-up work reviewers should know.
